label: SES-039 v0.6 slice C build-execution closeout: 1 session, 0 decisions, 0 planning items, 6 references

session.title: v0.6 slice C — panel retrofits + ReferencesSection sub-section rewrite
session.conversation_reference: Claude Code conversation opened against PRDs/product/crmbuilder-v2/prompts/CLAUDE-CODE-PROMPT-v2-ui-v0.6-C-panel-retrofits.md, the third of six v0.6 slice prompts. Delivered panel-level visual coherence across all 13 panels plus the in-place rewrite of widgets/references_section.py from v0.5's two-level Inbound/Outbound grouping to a sub-sectioned plain-list layout. Landed at commit 0114324 on 05-18-26 at 13:38 ET.
session.topics_covered:
Seed prompt: PRDs/product/crmbuilder-v2/prompts/CLAUDE-CODE-PROMPT-v2-ui-v0.6-C-panel-retrofits.md. This conversation delivered panel-level visual coherence across the application: form-control treatment, required-field affordance, status-hint captions on classification combos, a CollapsibleSection widget for Notes, and a structural rewrite of widgets/references_section.py.

build_app_stylesheet additions in ui/styling.py added QFormLayout QLabel + QLabel[role='form-label'] rules applying design pass §2.4 label treatment, editable field state coverage (focused/error/disabled/read-only) with error state via the dynamic fieldState property, and QLabel role hooks for references-kind-header and statusHintCaption. Form layout standardized on label-above EVERYWHERE: QFormLayout.WrapAllRows applied to every QFormLayout across all panel detail panes plus the crud_dialog base plus versioned_panel base. The required_label(text) helper in widgets/form_helpers.py renders a Lucide asterisk icon before the label text; panel detail builders and the CRUD dialog base adopt it for required fields.

Status combo hint captions landed as a per-panel QLabel below the status combo on Domains, Entities, CRM Candidates, plus the equivalent classification combo on Processes — caption text computed from each entity's propose-verify successor set. Notes collapsible toggle migrated from the flat QToolButton across Domains, Entities, Processes, and CRM Candidates to a new CollapsibleSection widget with the design pass §2.4 chevron + label treatment (object names preserved so tests still find sections).

ReferencesSection rewrite in widgets/references_section.py was a refactor in place: public API preserved (constructor signature, navigate_requested + references_changed signals, Add reference button, per-row right-click menu). The new _KIND_LABELS module constant maps (direction, relationship) tuples to title-case labels (Decided in, Supersedes, Hands off to, etc.). Sub-sectioned plain-list rendering replaces v0.5's two-level Inbound/Outbound grouping; entries render identifier (mono) + pretty entity type per design pass §2.4. The inbound_label / outbound_label constructor args are kept for backward compatibility but vestigial in the new model, documented as such.

Thirteen panels touched (Sessions, Decisions, Risks, Planning Items, Topics, Charter, Status, Domains, Entities, Processes, CRM Candidates, Engagements, References list-only) plus the two base classes. test_references_section.py rewritten to verify the kind-labeled sub-section layout while preserving v0.3 write-surface assertions; test_processes_panel.py::test_handoff_round_trips_directionally updated to drop the v0.5 '(N)' count suffix on kind headers. No schema changes; no API changes; v0.5 test suite remains green.
session.artifacts_produced: Committed at 0114324: crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/ui/styling.py (form-label + field-state + role hook QSS rules added); crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/ui/widgets/form_helpers.py (required_label helper); crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/ui/widgets/collapsible_section.py (new — CollapsibleSection widget); crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/ui/widgets/references_section.py (rewritten in place — sub-section plain-list model); 13 panel files retrofitted (WrapAllRows + required_label + status hint captions where applicable + CollapsibleSection migration where applicable); ui/base/crud_dialog.py + ui/base/versioned_panel.py (WrapAllRows + required_label adoption); tests/crmbuilder_v2/ui/test_references_section.py (rewritten for new model); tests/crmbuilder_v2/ui/test_processes_panel.py (handoff assertion updated).
session.in_flight_at_end: Slice D (dialogs + form controls per CLAUDE-CODE-PROMPT-v2-ui-v0.6-D-dialogs-and-form-controls.md) was next on the queue, but a follow-up palette-fix conversation (SES-040) interjected first based on a defect Doug discovered while reviewing slice A and slice B output against the Linux Mint OS theme.
